recommendations.title: Breakthrough Training for Experienced Player
recommendations.description: With 4242 games under your belt, focus on advanced concepts to break through your current 47.1% plateau.
exercises: Deep analysis: spend 2 hours analyzing every loss from your last 50 games
Study grandmaster games in your favorite openings (at least 20 games per opening)
Focus on complex endgames: Rook+Pawn vs Rook, opposite-colored bishops
Practice advanced tactics: X-ray attacks, deflection, interference patterns
Work on positional understanding: weak squares, pawn chains, piece coordination
success_criteria: Identify and fix your top 3 recurring strategic mistakes
Achieve rating improvement of 100+ points in next 6 months
